title: Trump officials: Iran deal to end war may take days
snippet: Trump administration officials including Vance, Witkoff, and Kushner indicated negotiations are in a 'very good place' but a weekend signing is unlikely, with the deal potentially taking several more days to finalize.
tag_reason: 신규 — 백악관 관리들이 협상이 '매우 좋은 위치'에 있지만 주말 서명은 없을 것이라며 며칠 더 걸릴 수 있다고 밝힌 보도
